creator: fender0107401@gmail.com
text:
In /usr/share/example/etc/make.conf, one of the following lines is outdated.

#SUP_UPDATE=
#
#SUP=            /usr/bin/csup
#SUPFLAGS=       -g -L 2
#SUPHOST=        cvsup.uk.FreeBSD.org
#SUPFILE=        /usr/share/examples/cvsup/standard-supfile
#PORTSSUPFILE=   /usr/share/examples/cvsup/ports-supfile
#DOCSUPFILE=     /usr/share/examples/cvsup/doc-supfile

I mean this:

#SUPFLAGS=       -g -L 2

"-g" is not supported by csup(1).
